title: Farm Route (Veteran)
lead: Choose the region and the city. 'Next' follows the whole route in order (Hoenn → Kanto → Sinnoh → Johto → Unova).

legend.meaning: 1 Stock: 2 Choice Scarf, 1 Choice Specs and 1 Black Glasses. The item swaps for the next gym show up as POST-BATTLE (green).
Typhlosion, Togekiss, Blastoise, Vanilluxe, Weezing, Garchomp.
The two Pokémon acting on the same turn (e.g. 'Water Spout + Helping Hand').
Prep for the next gym: heal, item swap and position swap.
Skips the gym/city and goes straight to the next stop on the route.

steps.text: Very low chance to last 4 turns; heal if Blastoise is hurt.
Switch Togekiss's Choice Specs to Choice Scarf.
Switch Togekiss's Choice Scarf to Choice Specs.
T1: Fake Out on Swellow + Explosion
Use Eruption + switch Garchomp for Togekiss and use Hyper Voice
Switch Weezing's Choice Band to Black Glasses.
Switch Weezing's Choice Band to Black Glasses.
If Vanilluxe faints to a crit Earthquake: send out Togekiss and use Hyper Voice (need to heal Typhlosion).
Switch Weezing's Choice Band to Black Glasses.
T1: Water Spout + switch Weezing for Vanilluxe
Switch Weezing's Black Glasses to Choice Band.
Switch Weezing's Black Glasses to Choice Band.
Optional gym (G2). Heal afterward if needed.
T2: Incinerate + switch Togekiss for Weezing (Assurance)
T1: Eruption + switch Togekiss for Weezing
Leave the battle. You may need to heal if Typhlosion is hurt.
Leave the battle. You may need to heal if Typhlosion is hurt.
T1: Water Spout + switch Weezing for Vanilluxe
If Cradily and Slowbro come in together on Turn 2, use Assurance on Cradily.
If Weezing gets KO'd by a Psychic crit: send out Vanilluxe (Blizzard).
You may need to heal if Typhlosion is hurt.
Position: Garchomp in the first slot and Togekiss in the second.
Switch to Typhlosion if Garchomp faints.
Switch Blastoise's Choice Scarf to Choice Specs.
Pick the solution based on whether you want to heal afterward or not.
Switch Blastoise's Choice Scarf to Choice Specs.
Switch Blastoise's Choice Scarf to Choice Specs.
Switch Blastoise's Choice Specs to Choice Scarf.
Switch Blastoise's Choice Specs to Choice Scarf.
Use Water Spout + Hyper Voice (Hyper Voice in place of Blizzard)
Lead with Weezing and Garchomp (you need Garchomp to faint; skip this stop if it doesn't faint).
Go to Unova WITHOUT healing. On arrival, use the Teleport Ocarina to quickly reach the Pokémon Center, switch your team, and head to Morimoto (in Castelia).
Go to Unova WITHOUT healing. On arrival, use the Teleport Ocarina to quickly reach the Pokémon Center, switch your team, and head to Morimoto (in Castelia).
T1: Explosion, then hard switch Garchomp to Blastoise
Go to Unova WITHOUT healing. On arrival, use the Teleport Ocarina to quickly reach the Pokémon Center, switch your team, and head to Morimoto (in Castelia).
Go to Unova WITHOUT healing. On arrival, use the Teleport Ocarina to quickly reach the Pokémon Center, switch your team, and head to Morimoto (in Castelia).
T1: Fake Out on Galvantula + Explosion

branch.prompt: What survived and KO'd your Pokémon?

steps.text: Send out Garchomp and use Earthquake
Send out Togekiss and use Hyper Voice
Optional stop: only if you have 2:45 on the clock. You need Garchomp to faint and Weezing and Typhlosion to be alive.
Switch Garchomp for Typhlosion, then use Explosion
1st of the 3 Striaton leaders. Identify the opponent before acting.
2nd leader. Identify the opponent before acting.
3rd leader. Identify the opponent before acting.
T1: switch Typhlosion for Vanilluxe + Hyper Voice
Leave the battle. You may need to heal if Typhlosion is hurt.
Leave the battle. You may need to heal if Typhlosion is hurt.
You may need to heal if Garchomp is hurt.
You may need to heal if Garchomp is hurt.
Teleport Ocarina again → Castelia Center (1st Unova gym). HEAL, switch back to your farm team and continue the route.

Team (cadozz): Chansey, Smeargle (Rocky Helmet), Infernape, Torterra — and also keep the Morimoto Smeargle (Choice Scarf) and Scyther in your team. Cynthia is in Undella Town (Unova), only in SUMMER/SPRING. She randomly picks 1 of 5 teams, with a random lead (Lvl 90; Garchomp Lvl 92). Do Cynthia BEFORE Morimoto. 1-on-1 fight (~9-10 turns).
Idea: Chansey baits and Teleports; you set up (Yawn / Stealth Rock) and Torterra comes in, uses Shell Smash and sweeps.

table.title: Chansey — depending on Cynthia's LEAD (then Teleport out)

branch.prompt: What are you facing AFTER the Teleport?

steps.text: Bring in Torterra straight away (no setup needed).
Infernape: Aura Sphere (it will faint to the Garchomp that shows up).
Did Garchomp take recoil (Life Orb) or switch in? Choose:
Infernape attacks (it will faint to Garchomp).
Did Gastrodon's Scald deal at least 9% damage?

branch.prompt: How much did Gastrodon's Scald deal?

steps.text: Infernape: Grass Knot (it faints to the Garchomp that shows up).
Infernape: Aura Sphere (faints to the Garchomp that shows up).
Lucario baits easily. See what happened:
Bring in Torterra. (On Team 5 the Garchomp is bulky: use Wood Hammer on it — Earthquake won't KO.)
Smeargle: Stealth Rock (repeat until Smeargle faints).
Torterra: Shell Smash (raises Attack and Speed a lot; its Shell Armor blocks crits).

Team (cadozz): Chansey, Scyther, Smeargle (Choice Scarf). Morimoto is in Castelia (Unova) — in the alley right of the Pokémon Center, enter the 1st building, take the elevator and walk straight; he's the rightmost of the three NPCs. Randomly picks 1 of 5 teams, random lead (Lvl 85). 1-on-1 fight (~9-10 turns).

Basic line (always follow): 1) Chansey Stealth Rock; 2) Chansey Teleport (Scyther comes in); 3) Scyther Swords Dance; 4) sweep. Each team has AT MOST 1 exception (~50% chance). Check in the order below and apply the first that matches; if none matches, just follow the basic line.

branch.prompt: Any exception showed up? (check in order)

options.label: Jolteon Thunderbolt or Simipour Ice Beam
No exception → follow the basic line

steps.text: Flareon holds Toxic Orb and goes for Superpower. Chansey: Soft-Boiled x2; then follow the basic line (Stealth Rock → Teleport → Scyther Swords Dance).
Simisear holds Life Orb and goes for Superpower. Chansey: Soft-Boiled x1; then follow the basic line.
Can happen from a Primeape crit. Bring in Smeargle and use Stealth Rock; then Scyther Swords Dance.
Bring in Smeargle and use Safeguard (prevents Dynamic Punch confusion). Then Scyther Swords Dance.
A Flame Orb Machamp is NOT choice-locked. Bring in Smeargle and use Encore (locks it out of Ice Punch). Then Scyther.
Jolteon using Thunderbolt or Simipour using Ice Beam: the AI won't switch (it has a weak Machamp). Bring in Smeargle and use Final Gambit to bait out Shuckle. Then Scyther.
Scyther: Swords Dance (if not up yet) — Technician + Quick Attack close out the fight.

targets: fast Pokémon: Dugtrio, Jolteon, Zebstrika, Primeape (Scarf)

steps.text: Morimoto beaten! HEAL your team if needed. Now take on Cynthia (Undella Bay).
